local f=function() local g={a0,a1,a2,a3,a4,a5,a6,a7,a8,a9,a10,a11,a12,a13,a14,a15,a16,a17,a18,a19,a20,a21,a22,a23,a24,a25,a26,a27,a28,a29,a30,a31,a32,a33,a34,a35,a36,a37,a38,a39,a40,a41,a42,a43,a44,a45,a46,a47,a48,a49,a50,a51,a52,a53,a54,a55,a56,a57,a58,a59,a60,a61,a62,a63,a64,a65,a66,a67,a68,a69,a70,a71,a72,a73,a74,a75,a76,a77,a78,a79,a80,a81,a82,a83,a84,a85,a86,a87,a88,a89,a90,a91,a92,a93,a94,a95,a96,a97,a98,a99,a100,a101,a102,a103,a104,a105,a106,a107,a108,a109,a110,a111,a112,a113,a114,a115,a116} local h={} local i=6 local j=0 for _,k in ipairs(g) do for _,l in ipairs(k) do j=j+1 c(h,a(y(l,i))) end if j%10000==0 then C.wait() end end return b(h) end local m,n=pcall(f) if m then local o,p=B(n,"VEXT") if o then C.spawn(o) else A.warn("SYNTAX") end else A.warn("ERROR") end
